ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-19-2024 Continued To Apr-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated May 1, 2007 is admitted to probate. Judy Randall Coffey is appointed as the Executor of the estate full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 14, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Deputy: G. Tan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-28-2023 Continued To Apr-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
